3004909.title: Ava Max's Maximum Pop Top 20
3004909.description: Sweet but Psycho singer Ava Max comes in to MTV HQ to count down her Maximum Pop 20. Including great music from Rihanna, Katy Perry, Beyonce - and of course Ava herself!
